releases.name: Update 2.3.1

releases.author: Torutu
releases.description:
# DaggerForge 2.3.0

## New

- **Loop countdown reset button** - countdown clocks whose name or content contains "loop" now show a reset (↩) button. Tapping it resets the clock to 0. For dice-based loop clocks, it also restores the roll button so you can re-roll.

## fix(now in a new version 2.3.1)

- when an adversary card has a countdown, it breaks in canvas because it has a new line between the html script
releases.name: Update 2.3.0

releases.author: Torutu
releases.description:
# DaggerForge 2.2.4

## Fixed

- HP and Stress tick marks now persist across reading/edit mode switches and across Obsidian restarts. Previously they reset whenever you switched modes or reopened Obsidian.
releases.name: Update 2.2.4

releases.author: Torutu
releases.description:
# DaggerForge 2.2.3

## Fixed

- Mobile: creator and editor forms now lay out correctly on small screens. Fields stack to a single column, inputs are tap-friendly, and the submit button spans full width.
- Mobile: select dropdowns and text inputs in the adversary and environment forms no longer had a dark background override that broke the desktop light theme.
- Mobile: environment textarea fields were capped at 400px wide on desktop. They now expand to fill the available width.
- HP and Stress collapse animation now uses the CSS grid row trick instead of `max-height`, giving a smooth fade-in at natural height without an arbitrary magic number.
releases.name: Update 2.2.3

releases.author: Torutu
releases.description:
# DaggerForge 2.2.0

changing the way I make tags
now if I make any changes only the largest change will effect its number once

## New

- **Unified Content Browser**  single tabbed side panel (Adversaries / Environments) replaces two separate panels. One ribbon button, instant tab switching, no re-fetch.
- **Content Creator chooser**  one entry point opens a picker for Adversary or Environment creator.
- **React integration**  browser panel is now powered by React (hooks, state, effects). Foundation for future interactive UI.
- **Horde adversary field**  "Members per HP" input appears when Type = Horde; saves as `Horde (5/HP)` format automatically.
- **Adversary HP/Stress collapse**  small toggle button on each card hides/shows the tick section. Collapsed by default. State persists across edit/view mode switches.
- **HP & Stress tick sync**  checkbox states survive mode switches via `sessionStorage`.
- **Settings page**  keyword highlight toggle and dice result duration slider under Obsidian Settings → DaggerForge.
- **Keyword highlighting**  `hope`, `fear`, `hp`, `stress` auto-colored in rendered cards (toggleable).
- **Dice improvements**  subtraction support (`1d10-2`), colored modifiers (green/red), configurable tooltip duration.
- **Rich text feature editor**  description fields replaced with a Tiptap rich text editor (bold, italic, headings, lists).
- **Dice & Battle Calculator**  now proper Obsidian modals (work on mobile), draggable, fully restyled with Lucide icons.
- **Browser filters**  unified filter bar with pill buttons, counter controls, clear button.
- **Faceted filter counts**  each filter option shows how many cards match. Counts are cross-filtered: selecting a type updates the source counts to reflect only matching cards, and vice versa. Counts update when cards are created, edited, or deleted.
- **Always-visible filter options**  all tiers, sources, and types are always listed even when no cards match. Zero-count options are dimmed rather than hidden.
- **Wide card toggle**  each rendered card has a toggle button (edit mode only) to switch between compact and full-width layout. State persists across reading and edit mode switches.
- **Sticky submit button**  the Insert/Update button in the creator and editor stays fixed at the bottom of the form while scrolling.

## Fixed

- Environment/adversary browser cards from JSON showed `undefined` descriptions  normalized at load time.
- Horde type lost `(X/HP)` on edit/re-save.
- Bullet points double-rendering in read mode  replaced native `ul/li` with custom `df-ul/df-li` divs.
- Dice expressions with `-` (e.g. `1d10-2`) now subtract correctly.
- `Owl Witch` and `Xero, Castle Killer` were merged into one entry  split into separate cards (VA013/VA014).
- Keyword colors consistent between edit and read mode.
- Modal drag now works across the entire modal surface, not just the title bar.
- Browser panel no longer requires reopening after creating or editing a card. Filter state and search text are preserved on refresh.
- Edit button on cards is now hidden in reading view where it has no effect.
- Obsidian native "Edit this block" button no longer overlaps card controls.
- Wide card option removed from the creator and filter bar (toggle is on the card itself now).
- Clicking the delete button on a browser card no longer also triggered card insertion.

## Infra

- Docker-based build (works on any machine via `make build`).
- WSL2 deploy support (`make deploy` via `deploy.sh`).
- `sessionStorage` for card state persistence; `toCustomHtml`/`toStandardHtml` for consistent list rendering.
- Jest config updated to handle `.tsx` files so all test suites run correctly.
- Browser refresh test suite added (6 cases) covering the unified view type and regression guards.
releases.name: Update 2.2.0

releases.author: Torutu
releases.description:
cleaning up the code and adding unit testing for future fixes and features

- removed unused and deprecated functions
- unified modal creation and edit elements in the same function
- renamed functions to a more understandable and related names to the function
- added unit tests with jest
- updated dependencies
- cursor changed to pointer hovering over buttons
releases.name: UPDATE 2.0.6

releases.author: Torutu
releases.description: # ROADMAP IS REACHED AND ACHIEVED after doing the final fixes and tweaks I noticed that all the roadmap goals have been reached, it is time for celebration. this project taught me so much and will carry that to the next project. it doesn't mean that I'm done with this plugin, I will still take care of it. it is just plugin for obsidian is quite restrictive to the things I want to make for Daggerheart, which what I want to do next is to make even more and even bigger tools for Daggerheart players! thank you all for your feedback and support <3
releases.name: UPDATE 2.0.0

releases.author: Torutu
releases.description:
# UPDATE 1.12.12

this update took longer than expected but I'm so happy to finally publish it

## Card Editor 1.11.9
- when you edit any card it will make duplicate and save the card

## Search Engine Improvement 1.12.10
- reworked the search engine now the search, filter and counter looks better and work better
- fixed where using filter and searching would override each other
- UI/UX features, the browser is more responsive to the user when mouse is hovered

## MORE BADGES 1.12.11
- Badges on the cards to show the version/source

## MORE CONTENT 1.12.12
- included more content from the daggerheart website each with a tag: Saberwood, Umbra and Void
releases.name: Update 1.12.12

releases.author: Torutu

releases.name: Update 1.9.10

releases.author: Torutu
releases.description: # **NEW FEATURES** ### Battle Guide Calculator added the encounter calculator from the book ### Dice Roller dice roller feature support multiple dices to be rolled at the same time ### data.json the plugin supports data.json for custom made content + Import data.json with the same format and structure as the custom made content ### Delete custom made content you can delete the custom made adversaries and environments + remove the entire data.json to have a new beginning ### Canvas support you can add the cards directly into canvas # NEXT UPDATE: ### Edit feature! ### Improving Search Engine! --- so far every challenge and problem have been solved! So happy to get to work on this plugin!! #### The road-map can be found in my ko-fi page #### your support and feedback means a lot to me [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/U7U01IE229) # How to Install download `style.css` `main.js` `manefist.json` access the plugins folder inside your plugins folder make a new folder named `daggerforge` and add the 3 files inside # How to Update if you already have `daggerforge` plugin then just replace the old three files with the current release files
releases.name: UPDATE 1.9.9

releases.author: Torutu
releases.description:
Updated plugin to follow Obsidian's coding and naming conventions.
Adjusted UI text to sentence case and prefixed CSS classes.
releases.name: Update 1.0.2

releases.author: Torutu
releases.description: ### Changes and Fixes - Daggerheart Adversary Creator now called 'Adversary Browser' (better description) - The actual Adversary Creator is now a button (before it was a command which is tedious over time) - Adversary Browser saves the current state, if you fill some inputs, close and reopen it will keep them stored, until you insert the card ## New Features ### HP & Stress Trackers - Every Adversary will have their own interactable trackers for their HP and Stress ### Environment Browser - You can browse Daggerheart enviornments all within small compact sidebar, with search and filter ### Environment Creator - Create and customize every part of your own Enviornments now you can access all of the plugin's features from the left ribbon without using any commands next will be **Encounter Calculator** and **Dice system** your support and feedback means a lot to me [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/U7U01IE229) # How to Install download `style.css` `main.js` `manefist.json` access the plugins folder inside your plugins folder make a new folder named `daggerforge` and add the 3 files inside # How to Update if you already have `daggerforge` plugin then just replace the old three files with the current release files # Known Bugs - Adversary Creator and Environment Creator share some of the temporary fields (when you type a name for Adversary but never insert the card it will carry on to the Environment fields)
releases.name: Update 1.3.0

releases.author: Torutu
releases.description: This is a community plugin for Obsidian, built specifically for the DaggerHeart! The first version is now live, you can easily add adversaries and create your own custom monsters right inside your notes. ## how to use Download `main.js` `manifest.json` `style.css` in Obsidian Community plugins create a folder, name it `daggerforge` and add the 3 files inside, reload your plugins and it should appear there you can find the plugin here and you can use the commands as well `ctrl + p` and search for `DaggerForge` --- It’s still early, but more features are on the way. Feedback and suggestions are always welcome! [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/U7U01IE229)
releases.name: Initial Release
